words.example: The potter shaped the wet clay into a beautiful vase.
The children played near the water fountain in the park.
The country's economy relies heavily on the export of petroleum.

words.definition:
n. 摄氏度
adj. 摄氏的
words.example: Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.
She added some fresh herbs to the soup to enhance its flavor.
They moved to a quiet suburb to escape the noise of the city center.
The heavy rain turned the small stream into a raging torrent.

words.definition: adj. 地震的，引起剧变的
words.example: The company's decision to restructure caused a seismic shift in the industry.
The rocky terrain made it difficult for the hikers to climb the mountain.

words.definition:
n. 沼泽，湿地
vt. 使淹没，使应接不暇
words.example: The heavy rains turned the low-lying area into a muddy swamp.
They live on the outskirts of London.

words.definition:
n. 后部; 后面
vt. 养育; 抚育
adj. 后部的; 后面的
vi. 竖起; 挺起
words.example: The children were reared in a small rural village.

words.definition:
n. 霉，霉菌，模具，模型，形状，品质
vt. 塑造，使成型，培养
words.example: The teacher's influence helped to mould the students' minds.

words.definition: n. 陶器，陶瓷制品，制陶术
words.example: The museum has a large collection of ancient Greek pottery.
Archaeologists have uncovered several ancient artifacts during the excavation of the site.

words.definition: vt. 活得比……长，比……更持久
words.example: She outlived her husband by many years.
The chefs were all wearing clean white aprons while preparing the meal.
She was wearing some exquisite gold jewellery.

words.definition: adj. 免疫的，有抵抗力的；免除的，不受……影响的
words.example: A healthy diet can help strengthen your immune system.
Dementia is a progressive disease that leads to the decline of cognitive functions.
Obesity is a major health concern that can lead to many chronic diseases.
Regular exercise is essential for maintaining good cardiovascular health.
The blue whale is the largest animal on Earth.

words.definition:
n. 渡轮，渡船
vt. 运送，接送
words.example: The ferry departs from the pier every hour.

words.definition:
n. 无人机，雄蜂，嗡嗡声，懒汉
vi. 发出嗡嗡声，单调地说话
words.example: The drone captured stunning aerial footage of the mountain range.
His reputation as an honest businessman was well known.

words.definition:
n. 素食者，素食主义者
adj. 素食的，素食主义的
words.example: She became a vegetarian after learning about the environmental impact of meat production.
She noticed a tiny insect crawling on the leaf.

words.definition:
n. 部分，一份，份额
vt. 分配，把…分成份
words.example: She only ate a small portion of the cake.

words.definition:
n. 平均数，平均水平
adj. 平均的，普通的，平常的
vt. 平均为，算出…的平均值
words.example: The average temperature in July is 30 degrees Celsius.

words.definition: vt. 热衷于，喜爱，对…感兴趣
words.example: She is keen on playing tennis.
The main ingredient of this sauce is tomatoes.
